channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: SpaceX targets fixed $135 IPO roadshow price at $1.75 trillion valuation, source says
item.description: The valuation would make Elon Musk's company the seventh-biggest in the U.S., above Tesla, which has a market cap of about $1.6 trillion.

item.title: Broadcom stock slips on disappointing software revenue
item.description: Broadcom reported fiscal second-quarter results on Wednesday and missed estimates for revenue.

item.title: Sellers are pulling homes off the market at the fastest pace since 2020
item.description: Frustrated sellers are pulling their homes off the market at an increasingly high pace, as demand weakens and bidding wars wane.

item.title: GOP Sen. Tillis slams Trump intelligence pick Pulte: 'Don't think he has a prayer'
item.description: Pulte is widely viewed as a Trump loyalist who has targeted the president's political foes during his tenure leading the housing regulatory agency.

item.title: Broadcom earnings could breathe new life into the chip rally
item.description: Analysts are eyeing custom artificial intelligence chip demand.

item.title: Historic stock rally faces key test
item.description: Two key tech companies reporting earnings after the bell could determine the next move higher or lower.

item.title: As Honeywell Aerospace readies for its standalone debut, its CEO is forecasting big growth
item.description: By 2030 Honeywell is targeting annual earnings of at least $6.5 billion and full-year free cash flow of at least $4 billion.

item.title: Trump says Iran agreed to not have nuclear weapons, but 'they can change their mind'
item.description: The president was speaking to the New York Post's "Pod Force One" podcast in a wide-ranging interview.

item.title: Netanyahu says he and Trump have 'tactical disagreements' but agree overall amid Iran war
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu sat down with CNBC's Sara Eisen for an exclusive interview about the Iran war and U.S.-Israeli relations.

item.title: Senate GOP strips up to $1B for Trump ballroom security from immigration enforcement bill
item.description: GOP leaders reportedly privately concluded that the funding proposal risked derailing the broader immigration bill, both politically and procedurally.

item.title: Hilton, Becerra lead in tight primary race for California governor; Bass ahead in LA mayoral race
item.description: Republican television commentator Steve Hilton and Democratic former cabinet secretary Xavier Becerra took the early lead in the open primary race for governor.

item.title: Josh Turek wins Iowa Democratic Senate primary that could shape Democrats' path to Senate majority
item.description: Iowa's Senate primary where state Rep. Josh Turek beat state Sen. Zach Wahls could be critical as Democrats look to take back power in Congress.

item.title: Bitcoin's high-conviction holders are turning into sellers as the crypto's price hits new lows
item.description: In the past two days, bitcoin's highest-conviction holders have sold about $2.4 billion in bitcoin.

item.title: Nvidia’s big dividend hike could pave the way for higher payouts — who may be next
item.description: Some on Wall Street believe there will be more dividend increases from tech companies following Nvidia's recent move.

item.title: A classic strategy that could yield big dividends
item.description: Packaging Corp of America (PKG) is an old-school, brick-and-mortar industrial business.

item.title: Best jumbo CD rates for June 2026: Earn up to 4.10% APY
item.description: Have a big deposit to put into savings? These top jumbo CDs offer above-average rates.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Exxon Mobil, GameStop, Palo Alto Networks, Blackstone & more
item.description: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Bessent says he is performing IRS commissioner duties amid Trump tax settlement scrutiny
item.description: Democrats pressed the Treasury chief over whether other taxpayers affected by the leak that included Trump's tax returns would receive similar treatment.

item.title: Private payrolls grew by 122,000 in May, stronger than expected, ADP reports
item.description: Unlike prior months, where job growth was concentrated in healthcare and a few other sectors, gains were more broad-based.

item.title: Khanna and China committee press Blanche for report on Chinese manufacturing in U.S.
item.description: The Justice Department report on illegal Chinese labor in the U.S. auto industry was due in May.

item.title: What's behind Palo Alto's earnings sell-off — and how to proceed
item.description: The stock was red hot into the earnings report.

item.title: Save on your next trip with these hotel booking apps
item.description: To score the best deals on hotels and lodging, use these tools to search and save.

item.title: Uber slashes people division by nearly a quarter. CEO says 'changes are necessary'
item.description: Uber said the cuts were not driven by AI, which has allowed many tech businesses to cut costs and automate workloads.

item.title: MSGS stock to get boost if Knicks can stretch Spurs series to game 6, Guggenheim says
item.description: Guggenheim raised its price target on MSG Sports, saying a Knicks-Spurs NBA Finals Game 6 could add over $15 million in revenue.

item.title: Social Security benefit cuts could average $500 a month for retirees if trust fund runs dry, report finds
item.description: Social Security faces a looming depletion date for its retirement trust fund. A new report looks at how much benefit cuts Americans may see to their benefits.

item.title: Morgan Stanley will soon open its trillion-dollar wealth management funnel to AI agents
item.description: Morgan Stanley's move is one of the earliest instances of a major Wall Street bank opening its platforms to external AI tools.

item.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman meets with lawmakers, Trump officials in DC
item.description: President Donald Trump signed an executive order about AI this week, which Altman voiced support for.

item.title: Bitcoin set to slump to new lows for 2026 after recent sell-off, traders forecast
item.description: The cryptocurrency is likely to break below its lows hit in early February, traders on prediction market Kalshi believe.

item.title: AT&T downgraded ahead of SpaceX IPO on coming broadband competition from Starlink
item.description: Space-based internet has its sights on traditional broadband providers

item.title: Leveraged ETF assets double in two months as investors press AI bet
item.description: Investors turn to ETFs linked to AI and Tech, with exposures in the U.S. and Korea/Taiwan doubling in just two months
